what_happened: Teacher prepares materials and greets children as they arrive.
Teacher introduces different textures and has children feel them.
Children practice fine motor skills by tearing paper along drawn lines.
Teacher introduces Eric Carle collage style; children tear colored paper and stick it onto sea animal outlines.
Children finish their artwork, wash their hands, and clean up the table.
Children have snack time and engage in free play.
Parents arrive to pick up the children and the session ends.
